name: Pasta e Fagioli
recipeIngredient: coffee filter cut down and tied tightly with thread)
1 teaspoon rosemary in a sack (use a
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil.
2. Saute vegetables until golden.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients and bring to boil.
4. Lower heat to simmer and cook until beans are tender.
5. When beans are just soft, add 6-8 oz ditalini pasta according to desired thickness.
6. Cook until pasta is tender.
7. Serve hot with grated cheese on the side.
